india_trends.title: Stocks to buy or sell: Osho Krishan of Angel One suggests buying Triveni Engineering, PCBL shares to buy - 23 April 2026
india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 and Sensex declined on April 23, influenced by global cues and rising crude prices. The Nifty 50 fell by 0.81%, while investors await earnings reports from key companies. Analysts suggest potential buying opportunities in Triveni Engineering and PCBL Chemical amid a cautious market outlook.

india_trends.summary: India's hotel industry is entering a strong growth phase. Average daily rates are rising, and investment returns are attractive.
